name: FastTrackEscalation
description: Handles requests to escalate a case or fast-track an approval. Also triggered automatically when sentiment score falls below the escalation threshold.
triggerPhrases: Can I speak to a planning officer
I need to speak to someone
Can I get a faster decision
I need to expedite my application

entities.name: caseNumber
entities.prompt: Do you have a case reference number?

entities.name: urgencyReason
entities.prompt: Could you briefly tell me why you need this to be fast-tracked?

automaticTriggerConditions.description: Auto-escalate if sentiment drops below -0.3 during any channel interaction.
Escalate if fast-track intent is identified with high confidence.

actions.description: Trigger Flow-02 to route the case to the Planning Officer queue.

confirmationMessage: I'm connecting you with a planning officer now. They have your case details and will be ready to assist you.
fallbackMessage: I'll transfer you to a planning officer who can help you with your request.
